name: Pennsylvania Chicken Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add celery, green peppers, and onion; cook until tender.
3. Stir in cream of chicken soup, milk, sour cream, and cheese. Heat on low until cheese melts.
4. Combine noodles, cheese sauce, cooked chicken, mushrooms, pimento, and seasonings in a large bowl.
5. Transfer the mixture to a 3-quart baking dish.
6. Top with toasted almonds.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 40 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
